core_objective.text: BUILD FACTOR MOMENTUM PORTFOLIO RESEARCH PIPELINE: multi-symbol bar loader, compute momentum and low-vol factor scores cross-sectionally, rank-and-weight portfolio with volatility scaling, walk-forward rebalance simulation, transaction cost model, verified PNL and factor exposure reports. Research only.

master_plan.title: Config + multi-symbol loader
master_plan.intent: config.py with UNIVERSE symbols list smoke mode. data_loader.py load_universe_bars() returns MultiIndex DataFrame. sample_data multi-symbol CSVs.

master_plan.title: Factor engine
master_plan.intent: factors.py: momentum_12_1, low_vol_20d, quality proxy from returns vol. compute_factor_scores(df) cross-sectionally z-scored.

master_plan.title: Portfolio constructor
master_plan.intent: portfolio.py: rank weights, vol-target scaling, max position cap, rebalance schedule. simulate_nav(weights, returns).

master_plan.title: Walk-forward backtest
master_plan.intent: backtest_pnl.py: expanding train window, OOS rebalance, costs. reports/pnl_report.json with factor exposures.
